suite.name: Api Testing

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api_session, url=https://practice.expandtesting.com/notes/api, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

test.name: TC 04: Complete Notes CRUD and Lifecycle Management

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://practice.expandtesting.com/notes/api/users/login path_url=/notes/api/users/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '77'} body=b'{"email": "robot_perfect_run_001@example.com", "password": "UpdatedPass456!"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: &{note_payload} = { title=Robot Framework Test | description=Learning API Automation | category=Home }
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://practice.expandtesting.com/notes/api/notes path_url=/notes/api/notes headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'x-auth-token': '64574118591f47299b94314acf500c564967adc3776942ee966d37fd45c745ee', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Cookie': 'express:sess=eyJmbGFzaCI6e319; express:sess.sig=tdt42nQZiQvICqmrvHQ1_16fHk0', 'Content-Length': '95'} body=b'{"title": "Robot Framework Test", "description": "Learning API Automation", "category": "Home"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://practice.expandtesting.com/notes/api/notes path_url=/notes/api/notes headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'x-auth-token': '64574118591f47299b94314acf500c564967adc3776942ee966d37fd45c745ee', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Cookie': 'express:sess=eyJmbGFzaCI6e319; express:sess.sig=tdt42nQZiQvICqmrvHQ1_16fHk0'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: DELETE On Session
kw.doc: Sends a DELETE request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
DELETE On Session
kw.msg: DELETE Request : url=https://practice.expandtesting.com/notes/api/users/delete-account path_url=/notes/api/users/delete-account headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'x-auth-token': '64574118591f47299b94314acf500c564967adc3776942ee966d37fd45c745ee', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Cookie': 'express:sess=eyJmbGFzaCI6e319; express:sess.sig=tdt42nQZiQvICqmrvHQ1_16fHk0', 'Content-Length': '0'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a DELETE request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

test.doc: Flow: ล็อกอิน(รหัสใหม่) -> สร้างโน้ต -> ตรวจสอบ -> ลบโน้ต

suite.doc: API Automation Testing Suite - Complete End-to-End
